title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 11 July 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 11 July 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 11 July 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 12/07/2025
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye continue to face a lack of momentum, with sentiment soft and activity largely stagnant. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-07-12_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-05-July-11-July-2025_compressed.pdf

Weekly Ship Recycling Report
05 July - 11 July 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
Ship recycling markets across South Asia and Türkiye continue to face a lack of momentum, with sentiment soft and activity largely stagnant. In India,
conditions remain flat as demand shows no meaningful improvement.
